## [00:00 - 02:06]

Hello, hello. Hey, I wanted to share with you a fun and easy way to use the Mastermind Business Hub to find royalty free images for your websites, funnels and products. So I'm bringing you this quick tutorial and let's dive in together. You can locate your media library from your settings menu. So let's navigate over to that now by selecting settings media and then opening our media library from inside of your media library. You'll notice you have a search bar up here. This allows you to search through your media. But if you use this dropdown feature, it also allows you to look for backgrounds unsplash and pixabay for some royalty free images. So let's use pixabay for this example. Now let's say that you teach new pet owners how to house train their puppies. You'll want to look up something like puppy. And you'll have a bunch of different images that you can use here. Really, I just wanted an excuse to look at all of these cute faces. But let's say we choose this one. You can go ahead and right click that and select add image to my media. It's been successfully added. So now let's go back and look at our media library once again. And you can see that image has been added here. So now as we go into our funnels and as we go into our websites, whatever it is that we're looking to create, we can easily add in that image. So I'll go ahead and use one of these at random just for this example. And you can see there's an image in this one. So let's go ahead and edit this. All right, here we go. We'll select this, select our image options, upload from media library. And then we have this lovely image that we can double click and it will upload from there. So I hope that helped you in knowing where you can find new royalty images. Yes, you don't have to leave the Mashman Business Hub. You can do it all in one spot.
